name: claude-code-fuel-gauge
description: A context meter for your context window

fuel-gauge.pollInterval.description: How often to check for context updates (in seconds)

fuel-gauge.warningThreshold.description: Percentage at which the indicator turns yellow

fuel-gauge.dangerThreshold.description: Percentage at which the indicator turns red

fuel-gauge.systemOverhead.description: Estimated system token overhead (system prompt, tools, MCP, CLAUDE.md). These tokens are invisible to the statusline but consume context. Increase if Fuel Gauge underreports compared to Claude Code's 'Context low' warning.
